texto: qYour pride for your country should not come after your country becomes great
autor: your country becomes great because of your pride in it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de your country becomes great because of your pride in it. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “qYour pride for your country should not come after your country becomes great” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, idowu-koyenikan, country, útil em momentos de reflexao.
